title: Uruguayan Pan-Seared Mackerel
description: A simple and flavorful Uruguayan-inspired dish featuring pan-seared mackerel with a crispy crust.
instructions: Season the mackerel fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the olive oil to the skillet and swirl to coat.
Sear the mackerel fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix the breadcrumbs with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Remove the skillet from the oven and top each mackerel fillet with breadcrumbs.
Return the skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the breadcrumbs are golden brown.
